title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes four strategies that Anthropic's Growth Team used to leverage Claude Code for rapid scaling: automating workflows, making sub-threshold work viable, building custom tools, and using AI as a thought partner. The video positions Claude Code as a productivity multiplier that can amplify business growth when applied strategically.
